    _getOperator: function (a) {
        switch (a) {
            case "+": return " {}+{} ";
            case "-": return " {}-{} ";
            case "=": return " {}={} ";
            case "<": return " {}<{} ";
            case ">": return " {}>{} ";
            case "<<": return " {}\\ll{} ";
            case ">>": return " {}\\gg{} ";
            case "\\pm": return " {}\\pm{} ";
            case "\\approx": return " {}\\approx{} ";
            case "$\\approx$": return " {}\\approx{} ";
            case "v": return " \\downarrow{} ";
            case "(v)": return " \\downarrow{} ";
            case "^": return " \\uparrow{} ";
            case "(^)": return " \\uparrow{} ";
            default:
                assertNever(a);
                throw ["MhchemBugT", "mhchem bug T. Please report."];
        }
    }
};
